allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m compileall src; Write-Output "--- compileall exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest --collect-only -q; Write-Output "--- pytest collect exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")
PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "--- pytest exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")
PowerShell(sam validate --lint --region us-east-1; Write-Output "--- sam validate exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")

PowerShell($p = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \($p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "NOT in default paths; searching..."; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)","$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Filter sam.cmd -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd" validate --lint --region us-east-1; Write-Output "--- sam validate exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")
PowerShell($env:SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY=0; & "C:\\Program Files\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd" validate --lint --region us-east-1; Write-Output "--- sam validate exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")
PowerShell($env:SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY=0; & "C:\\Program Files\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd" build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25; Write-Output "--- sam build exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")
PowerShell(docker --version 2>&1; Write-Output "--- docker exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---"; docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3)
PowerShell($env:SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY=0; & "C:\\Program Files\\Amazon\\AWSSAMCLI\\bin\\sam.cmd" build --use-container 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30; Write-Output "--- sam build exit: $LASTEXITCODE ---")

PowerShell($out = aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name clinica-pilates --region us-east-1 --query "Stacks[0].Outputs" --output json | ConvertFrom-Json; $out | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.OutputKey\) = $\($_.OutputValue\)" }; $url = \($out | Where-Object { $_.OutputKey -eq 'ApiBaseUrl' }\).OutputValue; Write-Output "--- testando health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$url/health" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $_" })
